content: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi, I need to change my flight to March 25th.
Sure. First, I’ll need to pull up your reservation. What’s your six-character confirmation number, and the last name on the booking?
The confirmation
is Z.
3FFW
and the last name is Rodriguez.
Thanks, Rodriguez. I want to make sure I have the confirmation number exactly right. Could you please say the full code again, one character at a time? It should be six letters and numbers.
Zulu.
Kilo.
Foxtrot.
Foxtrot Whiskey.
Less than a person.
name Rodriguez.

Got it. I’ve pulled up Samantha Rodriguez, confirmation code Zulu Kilo Three Foxtrot Foxtrot Whiskey. You’re confirmed on SkyWay flight Sierra Kilo six twenty-one on March twentieth, with seat twenty-two A. To move you to March twenty-fifth, is your origin and destination staying the same as this current booking? And what time of day do you prefer, morning, afternoon, or evening?
Yeah, same route.
Austin to LAX only.
Afternoon. As long as I arrive by 4 p.m. Pacific,

Perfect. For Wednesday, March twenty-fifth, Austin to Los Angeles, arriving by four PM Pacific, I have two good nonstop afternoon options. Option one is SkyWay flight Sierra Kilo seven thirty-nine. Departs one forty-five PM Austin time, arrives three PM Los Angeles time. Main Cabin fare is three hundred forty dollars. Option two is SkyWay flight Sierra Kilo seven eighty-one. Departs two thirty-five PM Austin time, arrives three fifty-five PM Los Angeles time. Main Cabin fare is five hundred twenty dollars. Since this is a voluntary change in Main Cabin, there’s a seventy-five dollar change fee, plus any fare difference. Which option would you like me to book?
Before I pick, I need the total cost to change each option.
All in.
including the change fee and fair difference.

For your current Main Cabin ticket, you paid two hundred sixty dollars. For flight Sierra Kilo seven thirty-nine at one forty-five PM, the new fare is three hundred forty dollars. That’s an eighty dollar fare difference, plus the seventy-five dollar change fee, so the total to change is one hundred fifty-five dollars. For flight Sierra Kilo seven eighty-one at two thirty-five PM, the new fare is five hundred twenty dollars. That’s a two hundred sixty dollar fare difference, plus the seventy-five dollar change fee, so the total to change is three hundred thirty-five dollars. Those totals are based on the current available fares right now. Which one should I switch you to?
Neither of those works.
My max total to change is $120.
Can you look for any other Austin to LAX flight on March 25th?
that arrives by 4 p.m. Pacific.
Keeps it under 120 total.
And has a Windows seat available?

On March twenty-fifth, to keep your total change cost at one hundred twenty dollars or less, the only option I can see is an earlier nonstop: SkyWay flight Sierra Kilo seven zero three. Departs eight fifteen AM Austin time, arrives nine twenty-five AM Los Angeles time. In Main Cabin, the fare is three hundred dollars, so your total to change would be one hundred fifteen dollars, which is the seventy-five dollar change fee plus a forty dollar fare difference. Window seats are showing as available. If that morning arrival works for you, I can switch you to that flight and request a window seat. Do you want me to book it?
That
Please move me to Sierra Kilo 703 on March 22nd.
25th.
And I need a confirmed Windows seat, not just a request.

I can do that. The total to change to SkyWay flight Sierra Kilo seven zero three on Wednesday, March twenty-fifth is one hundred fifteen dollars, which is the seventy-five dollar change fee plus a forty dollar fare difference. Do I have your okay to charge that one hundred fifteen dollars and rebook you now?
Yes, you have my okay to charge 115.
and rebook me on that that-specific window seat.

All set. I rebooked you to SkyWay flight Sierra Kilo seven zero three on Wednesday, March twenty-fifth, Austin to Los Angeles. It departs at eight fifteen AM Austin time and arrives at nine twenty-five AM Los Angeles time. I charged a total of one hundred fifteen dollars, made up of the seventy-five dollar change fee plus a forty dollar fare difference. And you now have a confirmed window seat, seat twenty-one A. Your confirmation number remains Zulu Kilo Three Foxtrot Foxtrot Whiskey.
Perfect. Thanks for getting that done.
Can you help me
with anything else on this reservation today.
You’re welcome. Yes, I can help. Right now you have seat twenty-one A, and no checked bags or special meal on the reservation. Do you want to add a checked bag, or request a special meal?
No, I do not want to add anything else.
Thanks for your help.
Bye.
